name: ai-pathfinder
description: Long-running, multi-agent coding workflow for large projects: autonomous codebase exploration, a live per-task HTML dashboard with batched human feedback, changed-files + diff view, code-review/security-review gates, checkpoint chat steering, a knowledge tree + graph, parallel runs in isolated git worktrees with a runs hub (history + cross-task analytics), and a self-growing project knowledge base. Also ships /new-product for greenfield product creation from scratch: PRD, vertical-slice phase plan, and an evolutionary generate-test-judge build-loop. And /improve, which surveys an existing app with a swarm of analysis sub-agents, reaches consensus on the best improvements via a voting panel, lets the human pick which to do, and fans them out as parallel /feature runs.
